labels.name: list_collections
labels.description: List all public collections on Lowtoxgear with title, handle, URL, and product count. Examples: "Certified Activewear", "Clean Supplements", "GOTS Certified", "Low-Tox Home Products".

labels.name: filter_by_certification
labels.description: Find Lowtoxgear products matching a specific low-tox certification or standard. Searches product tags + product_type for the term. Use for queries like "show me GOTS-certified products" or "PFAS-free options". Common terms: "GOTS", "OEKO-TEX", "PFAS-free", "fluorocarbon-free", "fragrance-free", "org

labels.name: get_policies
labels.description: Get Lowtoxgear shipping, refund, privacy, terms policy URLs, the bot/agent policy text, AND a pointer to the sister scanner service (com.lowtoxgear/scanner) for chemical-safety analysis of barcoded products.
